widget.convert: { "template": [ MultiContentEntryPixmapAlphaBlend(pos=(0,5), size=(120,60), png=0, backcolor=None, flags=BT_SCALE | BT_KEEP_ASPECT_RATIO), MultiContentEntryText(pos=(150,0), size=(400,70), flags=RT_VALIGN_CENTER, text=1), MultiContentEntryText(pos=(570,0), size=(260,70), flags=RT_VALIGN_CENTER, text=2), MultiContentEntryText(pos=(850,0), size=(300,70), flags=RT_VALIGN_CENTER, text=3), ], "fonts": [gFont("Regular",30)], "itemHeight": 70 }
